stack_brightness_max_notes: Brightness metric = mean / (EXPTIME * GAIN), i.e. counts per second per unit gain. From 2026-06-09 night, dark-sky 10s co-adds had per_s_per_gain ~ 12-16. Threshold 25 allows modest cloud-lit dark frames while excluding twilight/dawn pollution. Original capture frames (EXPTIME=10, GAIN=1) had per_s ~ 7, which is below the threshold — those will be kept by the rule below but consider trashing them on a separate pass since they're pre-pipeline and have different processing assumptions.
